Yes it happened to me and I raised the concern it was a bakery and Restruant I went to in Jumierah used my invest bank card on the machine for 10 DHS confirmed 5814 and when I swipe mawarid the MCC became after a month of waiting to see it 5812 while I used both cards on same machine same time Yes there is something weird about mawarid I can confirm that for fact but I use it where Im sure I get the 10 like regular cafe I go to or supermarkets not for random first time places or places where I know mawarid wouldnt give In addition Mawarid dont give 2 on all transactions in their terms page you would see real estate government and more wont give u anything and I called them and it was confirmed In addition I got the world card I asked them to reduce my limit from 30k they said not possible u will have to degree to platinum card I said ok they said to reduce the limit there is 105 DHS fee Its funny bank but also good if u know how to play the MCC system well
My advice to u get nbf Islamic card 10 all dining codes without exception up to 150 Dhs thats 15k monthly

Yes its true Those are possible If anyone is worried they can take proactive steps to help prepare for any of those situations 1 Know that for financial systems they will roll out solutions for that 2 Find alternative sources for those sites Libraries still exist for certain things and books and what cant be accessed on those sites nor find alternatives you just learn to adjust without them 3 Terabyte hardrives and zip drives photo albums scrapbooks etc You can print off pictures for 1025 cents a piece for places like Walmart or the Library for physical versions 4 We dont need ai We have survived without it easily As much drinking water 2 gallons it takes to produce a single ai photo generation youre helping the environment by NOT using ai at all We have google libraries sites with free books free tutorials online etc Well be fine 5 Tricky but we survived without it Mainly those who rely on it for health conditions and disability would be the worst affected otherwise its convenience only and not a need 100 years ago we were growing our own food and gardens using homeemade remedies from weeds and plants locally and more A lot of things you can easily learn with prepper guides if you dont know someone who still does stuff like that 6 They would provide an alternative for that Im sure quite quickly 7 Starlink is accessible in wartorn areas So even if there is a short time down it wont be for long and anyone who has access to starlink the person could use their account or talk to that person etc They would find ways to get internet back up at some point For every one problem there are one million solutions You stop panicking and worrying learn to adapt and solve problems together as a community with the people around you

A public USB charging port can be unsafe sometimes because a USB cable doesnt only carry electricity it can also transfer data If someone has secretly modified that charging port it might try to communicate with your phone when you plug it in In rare cases it could attempt to access information or send harmful software to the device This kind of attack is often called different names one is being USBBased Attack Use your own original charger brick or an authorized brand brick and cable to stay safe

Hey if youre thinking about moving for these taxfree jobs make sure you understand expat tax rules especially the Foreign Earned Income Exclusion FEIE It really helps people working abroad Check out requirements like the physical presence test to qualify Also look into the benefits package and cost of living in these places Living in the Middle East can be pretty different from the US so think about your lifestyle needs For daytoday costs check expat forums or local expat groups for real insights If youre serious it might be worth consulting a tax professional who knows international tax law Good luck
